translations.Calcule o valor das férias com o adicion: Calculate the vacation amount with the additional 1/3 constitutional based on base salary and vacation days. Free tool.
translations.Estimar o valor total das férias, inclui: Estimate the total vacation amount, including the constitutional additional 1/3, based on the base salary and the number of vacation days the worker is entitled to.
translations.Útil para profissionais de enfermagem e: Useful for nursing professionals and other workers to check the amount received as vacation, whether taken or sold (pecuniary allowance).
translations.Trabalhadores celetistas com direito a f: CLT workers entitled to annual paid vacation.
translations.Total de dias de direito a férias no per: Total number of vacation days entitled in the period (30 days for full vacation; less for proportional vacation). The final amount is the same whether the period is taken as rest or converted into pecuniary allowance (sale of up to 1/3 of vacation).
translations.Valor estimado das férias, já incluindo: Estimated vacation amount, including the constitutional additional 1/3, based on the reported salary and the number of vacation days the worker is entitled to.
translations.• Confira o valor com o holerite e o dep:
• Check the amount with your pay stub and HR department
• Remember that vacation pay must be made up to 2 days before the start of the vacation period
• If in doubt, consult the category union or an accounting/labor law professional
translations.O direito a férias anuais remuneradas co: The right to annual paid vacation with at least 1/3 more than the normal salary is provided for in Art. 7, item XVII, of the Federal Constitution of 1988, and regulated by Arts. 129 to 145 of the CLT. After each 12-month work period (acquisition period), the worker is entitled to 30 days of vacation, and may convert up to 1/3 of this period into pecuniary allowance (sale of vacation).
translations.O abono pecuniário (venda de até 10 dias: The pecuniary allowance (sale of up to 10 vacation days) does not represent additional payment beyond the normal vacation amount — it merely converts rest days into advance payment, maintaining the total amount proportional to the 30-day entitlement, always plus the constitutional 1/3 on the total.
translations.O cálculo pode ser proporcional em casos: The calculation may be proportional in cases of incomplete vacation (less than 12 months worked) or contract termination, requiring adjustment according to the number of months/days worked in the acquisition period.
translations.Esta calculadora apresenta uma estimativ: This calculator provides a simplified estimate for educational and verification purposes, considering only the reported base salary. It does not replace the official payroll calculation or guidance from an accounting or labor law professional. Averages of habitual additional payments (overtime, night shift differential) must be included in the actual vacation calculation base.
translations.O pagamento das férias deve ser feito at: Vacation payment must be made up to 2 days before the start of the vacation period.
translations.O valor total das férias é o mesmo, seja: The total vacation amount is the same whether the period is fully taken or partially converted into pecuniary allowance.
translations.Se houver médias de horas extras, adicio: If there are averages of overtime, night shift differential, or habitual commissions, they must be included in the actual calculation base, in addition to the base salary.
translations.Em caso de férias proporcionais (menos d: In case of proportional vacation (less than 12 months worked), adjust the number of vacation days entered.
translations.Qual o adicional constitucional aplicado: What is the constitutional additional applied to the vacation amount?
translations.O Art. 7º, XVII, da Constituição Federal: Art. 7, XVII, of the Federal Constitution guarantees paid vacation with at least 1/3 more than the normal salary.
translations.O abono pecuniário (venda de férias) aum: Does the pecuniary allowance (sale of vacation) increase the total amount received?
translations.Sim, sempre dobra o valor: Yes, it always doubles the amount
translations.Não, apenas converte dias de descanso em: No, it only converts rest days into advance payment, keeping the total amount proportional.
translations.Sim, mas apenas para quem trabalha mais: Yes, but only for those who have worked more than 10 years at the company.
translations.O abono pecuniário foi extinto pela refo: The pecuniary leave was abolished by the labor reform.
translations.O abono pecuniário não é um pagamento ex: Pecuniary leave is not an extra payment — it converts up to 1/3 of vacation days (10 days) into advance payment, but the total amount remains proportional to the 30 days of entitlement, always with the constitutional 1/3.
translations.Até quando o empregador deve pagar as fé: By when must the employer pay the worker's vacation?
translations.No dia do retorno ao trabalho: On the day of return to work.
translations.Até 2 dias antes do início do período de: Up to 2 days before the start of the vacation period.
translations.Até 30 dias após o início das férias: Up to 30 days after the start of the vacation.
translations.Não há prazo definido em lei: There is no deadline defined by law.
translations.A CLT determina que o pagamento das féri: The CLT determines that vacation payment must be made up to 2 days before the start of the respective vacation period.
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta educacional para e: No. It is an educational tool for estimation and verification. The official calculation must consider averages of habitual additional payments and other contractual particularities, being the responsibility of the company's HR department.
translations.É possível vender todas as férias?: Is it possible to sell all vacation days?
translations.Não. A CLT permite a conversão em abono: No. The CLT allows the conversion into pecuniary leave of at most 1/3 of the vacation period (i.e., up to 10 days out of a total of 30), with at least 20 days of effective rest being mandatory.
translations.<p>O valor das férias é calculado a part:
The vacation amount is calculated from the daily salary (base salary ÷ 30), multiplied by the number of vacation days the worker is entitled to, plus the constitutional additional 1/3 of that amount.

Formula: Vacation Amount = (Salary ÷ 30) × Vacation Days × 4/3 (where 4/3 represents the full amount plus the additional 1/3).

translations.O valor das férias é calculado a partir: The vacation amount is calculated from the daily salary (base salary ÷ 30), multiplied by the number of vacation days the worker is entitled to, plus the constitutional additional 1/3 of that amount.

translations.Percentual mínimo garantido pela Constit: Minimum percentage guaranteed by the Federal Constitution is 50%. Sundays, holidays, and some collective agreements may provide a higher percentage.
translations.Valor estimado das horas extras devidas,: Estimated value of overtime due, based on the salary provided, number of overtime hours, and applicable percentage.
translations.• Confira o valor com o holerite e o dep:

translations.O direito à remuneração de horas extras: The right to overtime pay with a minimum 50% increase over the normal hourly rate is provided in Art. 7, item XVI, of the Federal Constitution of 1988 and regulated by Art. 59 of the CLT. The divisor 220 corresponds to the standard monthly workload of 44 hours per week (220 = 44 hours × 5 weeks, approximately).
translations.Convenções e acordos coletivos de trabal: Collective bargaining agreements often establish a 100% percentage for overtime performed on Sundays and holidays, although this percentage is not an automatic federal legal minimum, depending on the professional category.
translations.O cálculo pode variar conforme o divisor: The calculation may vary according to the salary divisor applicable to the category (220h is the most common for a 44-hour workweek, but other divisors may apply for different workloads, such as 200h or 180h).
translations.Esta calculadora apresenta uma estimativ: This calculator provides a simplified estimate for educational and verification purposes. It does not replace the official payroll calculation or guidance from an accounting or labor law professional. When applicable, the hours bank may change the way overtime is compensated.
translations.Confirme o divisor salarial aplicável à: Confirm the salary divisor applicable to your category (220h is the standard for a 44-hour workweek).
translations.Verifique a convenção coletiva da catego: Check the category's collective agreement, which may provide a percentage higher than the constitutional minimum of 50%.
translations.Se a empresa adotar banco de horas, as h: If the company adopts a hours bank, overtime may be compensated with time off instead of payment — check the current agreement.
translations.As horas extras habituais integram o cál: Regular overtime is included in the calculation of vacation pay, 13th salary, and FGTS.
translations.Qual o percentual mínimo constitucional: What is the minimum constitutional percentage for overtime?
translations.A Constituição Federal (Art. 7º, XVI) ga: The Federal Constitution (Art. 7, XVI) guarantees a minimum 50% increase over the normal hourly rate for overtime work.
translations.O que é o divisor 220 usado no cálculo d: What is the divisor 220 used in calculating the normal hourly rate?
translations.Número de dias do ano: Number of days in the year
translations.Jornada mensal padrão para 44h semanais: Standard monthly workload for 44h per week
translations.Número de feriados no ano: Number of holidays in the year
translations.Não tem relação com o cálculo: It has no relation to the calculation
translations.O divisor 220 corresponde à jornada mens: The divisor 220 corresponds to the standard monthly workload for a 44-hour workweek, being the most common, but may vary according to the category.
translations.O banco de horas elimina o pagamento de: Does the hours bank eliminate overtime pay?
translations.Pode substituir o pagamento por compensa: It may replace payment with compensatory time off, as agreed
translations.Não tem relação com horas extras: It is not related to overtime
translations.O banco de horas permite compensar horas: The time bank allows compensating overtime with time off instead of payment, provided that the applicable legal limits and agreements are respected.
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta educacional para e: No. It is an educational tool for estimation and verification. The official calculation must be performed by the company's HR department, considering the collective bargaining agreement and applicable salary divisor.
translations.Horas extras habituais alteram o valor d: Do habitual overtime hours affect the value of other labor entitlements?
translations.Sim. Horas extras realizadas de forma ha: Yes. Habitual overtime hours are included in the calculation basis for vacation pay, 13th salary, FGTS, and may impact severance payments, according to consolidated understanding in Labor Courts.
translations.<p>O valor da hora extra é calculado a p:
The overtime value is calculated from the normal hourly rate (salary ÷ 220, for a 44-hour workweek), multiplied by the number of overtime hours worked, and increased by the applicable overtime percentage (minimum 50%, may be higher per collective agreement or work on Sundays/holidays).

Formula: Overtime Value = (Salary ÷ 220) × Overtime Hours × (1 + Percentage/100).

translations.• Confira o valor com o Termo de Rescisã:
• Check the amount with the Employment Termination Agreement (TRCT)
• Proportional notice period is limited to 90 total days by law — manually review if the employee has more than 20 years at the company
• If in doubt, consult the category union or an accounting/labor law professional
translations.O cálculo de rescisão trabalhista por de: The calculation of severance pay for unfair dismissal sums various items: salary balance (days worked in the month), indemnified notice period (30 days plus 3 days per full year of service, according to Law No. 12,506/2011, limited to 90 days), accrued and proportional vacation plus 1/3 constitutional addition, proportional 13th salary, and termination fine of 40% on the FGTS balance (Art. 18, §1, Law No. 8,036/1990).
translations.Cada tipo de desligamento (demissão sem: Each type of dismissal (unfair dismissal, resignation, dismissal for cause, mutual agreement between employee and employer according to Art. 484-A of CLT) entitles different benefits. This calculator only covers the scenario of unfair dismissal by employer initiative, the most common and complete in terms of rights.
translations.O valor real pode variar conforme conven: The actual amount may vary according to collective bargaining agreements, averages of habitual additional payments (overtime, night shift premium, commissions) that must compose the calculation basis, and possible deductions (social security, income tax, advances, transportation vouchers).
translations.Esta calculadora apresenta uma estimativ: This calculator provides a simplified estimate for educational purposes, considering only the scenario of dismissal without just cause. It does not include INSS/IRRF discounts, averages of habitual additional payments, nor does it cover other types of termination (resignation, dismissal for just cause, mutual agreement, end of probationary contract), which have their own rules. It does not replace the official termination calculation or guidance from an accounting or labor law professional.
translations.Esta calculadora contempla apenas demiss: This calculator only covers dismissal without just cause — resignation and dismissal for just cause have very different entitlements (e.g., no paid notice period from the employer and no FGTS fine).
translations.O aviso prévio proporcional é limitado a: The proportional notice period is limited to 90 total days by law, even if the simple calculation (30 + 3×years) exceeds this value for workers with more than 20 years at the company.
translations.Lembre-se de incluir médias de horas ext: Remember to include averages of habitual overtime and night shift premiums in the actual calculation base, which are not covered in this simplified estimate.
translations.O Termo de Rescisão do Contrato de Traba: The Termination of Employment Contract (TRCT) must detail each payment separately — use it for verification.
translations.Rescisão recente, pouco tempo de casa: Recent termination, short time at the company
translations.Quais verbas compõem tipicamente uma res: What payments typically make up a termination for dismissal without just cause?
translations.Apenas o salário do último mês: Only the salary of the last month
translations.Saldo de salário, aviso prévio, férias +: Outstanding salary, notice period, vacation + 1/3, proportional 13th salary, and FGTS fine
translations.A rescisão sem justa causa tipicamente s: Termination without just cause typically includes outstanding salary, notice period, accrued/proportional vacation + 1/3, proportional 13th salary, and 40% FGTS fine.
translations.Qual o limite máximo legal do aviso prév: What is the maximum legal limit for proportional notice period?

translations.Rastreie delirium com o CAM (Confusion A: Screen for delirium using the CAM (Confusion Assessment Method). Screening tool based on 4 clinical criteria, with interpretation, nursing diagnosis, and evidence.
translations.Rastrear a presença de delirium a partir: Screen for the presence of delirium based on 4 characteristic clinical criteria, allowing early identification and timely intervention.
translations.Indicada para pacientes hospitalizados,: Indicated for hospitalized patients, especially the elderly, postoperative, and critically ill patients, with suspected acute change in mental status.
translations.Pacientes adultos hospitalizados, com at: Hospitalized adult patients, with special attention to the elderly and intensive care patients (in this context, the CAM-ICU version, adapted for non-verbal/mechanically ventilated patients, is used).
translations.Há evidência de mudança aguda no estado: Is there evidence of an acute change in mental status from the patient's baseline? Does the abnormal behavior fluctuate during the day (worsen and improve, or vary in severity)?
translations.Sem alteração aguda ou flutuação do esta: No acute change or fluctuation in mental status.
translations.Presença de início agudo e/ou curso flut: Presence of acute onset and/or fluctuating course of mental status.
translations.O paciente apresenta dificuldade em foca: Does the patient have difficulty focusing attention, e.g., being easily distracted or having difficulty following what is being said?
translations.O pensamento do paciente é desorganizado: Is the patient's thinking disorganized or incoherent, with rambling or irrelevant conversation, unclear or illogical flow of ideas, or unpredictable switching of subjects?
translations.O nível de consciência do paciente é dif: Is the patient's level of consciousness different from alert, such as hypervigilant (hyperalert), lethargic, stuporous, or comatose?
translations.Paciente alerta, nível de consciência no: Patient alert, normal level of consciousness.
translations.Nível de consciência alterado (vigilante: Altered level of consciousness (hypervigilant, lethargic, stuporous, or comatose).
translations.Não preenche os critérios diagnósticos d: Does not meet CAM diagnostic criteria for delirium. Requires criteria 1 and 2 to be present, associated with at least one of criteria 3 or 4.
translations.• Manter vigilância clínica de rotina\n•:
• Maintain routine clinical surveillance
• Reassess if there is a change in mental status
• Investigate and correct risk factors for delirium (pain, sleep deprivation, polypharmacy)
translations.Presença de delirium: critérios 1 (iníci: Presence of delirium: criteria 1 (acute onset/fluctuating course) and 2 (inattention) present, associated with at least one of criteria 3 (disorganized thinking) or 4 (altered level of consciousness).
translations.• Comunicar imediatamente à equipe médic:
• Immediately communicate to the medical team
• Investigate reversible causes (infection, metabolic disorders, medications, pain, urinary/fecal retention)
• Implement non-pharmacological reorientation measures
• Reassess frequently the evolution of the condition
• Ensure patient safety (risk of falls and device removal)
translations.Início abrupto de perturbações reversíve: Abrupt onset of reversible disturbances of consciousness, attention, cognition, and perception that develop over a short period.
translations.Vulnerabilidade aumentada a quedas, que: Increased vulnerability to falls, which may cause physical harm, associated with confusion.
translations.Orientação em tempo, espaço e pessoa pre: Orientation to time, place, and person preserved
translations.Aplicar o CAM de forma sistemática em pa: Apply the CAM systematically in at-risk patients
translations.Identificar e corrigir fatores precipita: Identify and correct precipitating factors (pain, infection, metabolic disorders, polypharmacy)
translations.Promover medidas de reorientação (relógi: Promote reorientation measures (clock, calendar, presence of family members)
translations.Comunicar achados à equipe médica para i: Communicate findings to the medical team for investigation and management
translations.O CAM (Confusion Assessment Method) foi: The CAM (Confusion Assessment Method) was developed by Sharon Inouye and colleagues in 1990, being the most widely used and validated delirium screening instrument worldwide. It is based on 4 criteria: (1) acute onset and fluctuating course, (2) inattention, (3) disorganized thinking, and (4) altered level of consciousness. Diagnosis requires the presence of criteria 1 and 2, plus at least one of criteria 3 or 4.
translations.Adaptado para o ambiente de terapia inte: Adapted for the intensive care environment as CAM-ICU, allowing assessment in non-verbal and mechanically ventilated patients, recommended by international guidelines for pain, agitation, and delirium management (PADIS).
translations.Apresenta sensibilidade entre 94% e 100%: It presents sensitivity between 94% and 100% and specificity between 90% and 95% in original and validation studies, when applied by trained raters.
translations.Requer treinamento adequado da equipe pa: Requires adequate team training for reliable application. The standard CAM assumes verbal communication; for non-verbal or mechanically ventilated patients, the adapted CAM-ICU version should be used.
translations.Os critérios 1 e 2 são obrigatórios; o d: Criteria 1 and 2 are mandatory; diagnosis also requires at least one of criteria 3 or 4.
translations.Compare sempre com o estado mental basal: Always compare with the patient's baseline mental status, not just the current isolated state.
translations.Em pacientes sob ventilação mecânica ou: In mechanically ventilated or non-verbal patients, use the adapted CAM-ICU version.
translations.O CAM só deve ser aplicado em pacientes: CAM should only be applied in patients with RASS between -3 and +4 (level of consciousness compatible with assessment).
translations.Quais critérios são obrigatórios para o: Which criteria are mandatory for a positive CAM diagnosis?
translations.O diagnóstico exige a presença obrigatór: Diagnosis requires mandatory presence of criteria 1 (acute onset/fluctuating course) and 2 (inattention), plus at least one of criteria 3 or 4.
translations.Qual versão do CAM é usada em pacientes: Which version of CAM is used in mechanically ventilated patients?
translations.O CAM-ICU foi desenvolvido especificamen: CAM-ICU was specifically developed for delirium assessment in non-verbal or mechanically ventilated patients in intensive care.
translations.O delirium hipoativo apresenta sempre ag: Does hypoactive delirium always present with agitation?
translations.Não, pode se manifestar com letargia e r: No, it may manifest with lethargy and reduced activity
translations.É sinônimo de delirium hiperativo: It is synonymous with hyperactive delirium
translations.O delirium hipoativo se manifesta com le: Hypoactive delirium manifests with lethargy, reduced motor activity, and drowsiness, and may go unnoticed without active screening with CAM.
translations.O CAM pode ser aplicado em qualquer níve: Can CAM be applied at any level of consciousness?
translations.Não. O CAM (e o CAM-ICU) devem ser aplic: No. CAM (and CAM-ICU) should only be applied when the patient has a level of consciousness compatible with assessment, generally RASS between -3 and +4. Deep sedation (RASS -4 or -5) precludes reliable assessment.
translations.Delirium é o mesmo que demência?: Is delirium the same as dementia?
translations.Não. O delirium tem início agudo e curso: No. Delirium has acute onset and fluctuating course, generally reversible when the underlying cause is treated. Dementia has insidious onset, progressive and chronic course. Both can coexist, making differential diagnosis difficult.
translations.<p>O CAM avalia 4 critérios clínicos: in:
CAM assesses 4 clinical criteria: acute onset/fluctuating course, inattention, disorganized thinking, and altered level of consciousness. The result is positive for delirium when criteria 1 and 2 are present, plus at least one of criteria 3 or 4.

Quick guide: Criteria 1 + 2 + (3 or 4) = CAM Positive (delirium present). Absence of this combination = CAM Negative.

translations.O Método de Capurro Somático foi desenvo: The Capurro Somatic Method was developed by Hernán Capurro and colleagues in 1978, estimating the newborn's gestational age from 5 physical (somatic) signs: skin texture, ear form, mammary gland, nipple formation, and plantar creases, without the need for neurological assessment.
translations.Amplamente utilizado em salas de parto e: Widely used in delivery rooms and neonatal units as a quick and simple alternative to the Ballard Method (which includes more complex neuromuscular criteria), especially when gestational age by last menstrual period is unknown or unreliable.
translations.Validado para recém-nascidos com 29 sema: Validated for newborns of 29 weeks or more of gestational age, with good correlation with actual gestational age, presenting a margin of error of approximately ±1 week.
translations.Não deve ser utilizado em recém-nascidos: Should not be used in newborns with less than 29 weeks of estimated gestational age. Like other somatic methods, its accuracy may be reduced in cases of intrauterine growth restriction or other conditions affecting fetal somatic development.
translations.O Método de Capurro Somático não deve se: The Capurro Somatic Method should not be used in newborns with less than 29 weeks of estimated gestational age.
translations.Realize a avaliação preferencialmente na: Perform the assessment preferably within the first hours of life, before postnatal changes may influence the signs.
translations.Compare sempre com a data da última mens: Always compare with the last menstrual period and/or early ultrasound, when available, for greater accuracy.
translations.O resultado é uma estimativa, com margem: The result is an estimate, with a margin of error of approximately 1 week.
translations.Quantos sinais físicos compõem o Método: How many physical signs compose the Capurro Somatic Method?
translations.O método avalia 5 sinais somáticos: text: The method evaluates 5 somatic signs: skin texture, ear shape, breast tissue, nipple formation, and plantar creases.
translations.A partir de qual idade gestacional o Mét: From what gestational age is the Capurro Somatic Method valid?
translations.O Método de Capurro Somático é validado: The Capurro Somatic Method is validated for newborns with 29 weeks or more of estimated gestational age.
translations.Qual a principal vantagem do Método de C: What is the main advantage of the Capurro Method compared to the Ballard Method?
translations.É mais preciso em prematuros extremos: It is more accurate in extreme preterm infants
translations.É mais simples, avaliando apenas sinais: It is simpler, evaluating only somatic signs, without neurological examination
translations.O Capurro Somático é mais rápido e simpl: The Capurro Somatic is faster and simpler because it evaluates only physical (somatic) signs, without the need for the more complex neuromuscular examination used in the Ballard Method.
translations.O Método de Capurro substitui a data da: Does the Capurro Method replace the last menstrual period (LMP)?
translations.Não. É utilizado principalmente quando a: No. It is mainly used when LMP is unknown or unreliable, or as a complementary method to confirm gestational age estimated by other means.
translations.Qual a margem de erro esperada do Método: What is the expected margin of error of the Capurro Method?
translations.O método apresenta margem de erro de apr: The method has a margin of error of approximately 1 week in relation to the actual gestational age, being an estimate and not an exact measurement.
translations.<p>O Método de Capurro Somático soma pon:
The Capurro Somatic Method sums points from 5 physical signs — skin texture, ear shape, breast tissue, nipple formation, and plantar creases — and adds a constant of 204, dividing the result by 7 to obtain the estimated gestational age in weeks.

Formula: Gestational Age (weeks) = (Sum of Points + 204) ÷ 7.

translations.O Escore de Centor foi desenvolvido orig: The Centor score was originally developed by Robert Centor in 1981, combining 4 clinical criteria (fever, absence of cough, tender anterior cervical lymphadenopathy, and tonsillar exudate) to estimate the probability of streptococcal pharyngitis in adults. Warren McIsaac later added an age adjustment, expanding the score's applicability to children and improving its accuracy.
translations.Amplamente utilizado na atenção primária: Widely used in primary care to guide decisions on rapid test/culture and rational antibiotic prescription, contributing to more judicious use of these medications in viral pharyngitis (the majority of cases).
translations.Validado extensivamente na literatura, c: Extensively validated in the literature, with good correlation between the score and the actual probability of a positive culture for group A streptococcus.
translations.Não deve ser o único critério de decisão: Should not be the sole criterion for therapeutic decision-making—rapid test or culture, when available, are the preferred diagnostic confirmation methods. Most acute pharyngitis cases have a viral etiology, even with a high score.
translations.O ajuste de idade de McIsaac melhora a a: McIsaac age adjustment improves the score's applicability for children, reducing unnecessary antibiotic use in adults.
translations.A maioria das faringites agudas tem etio: Most acute pharyngitis cases have a viral etiology, even with a high Centor score—rapid test/culture remains the standard for diagnostic confirmation.
translations.Sinais de alarme (dificuldade respiratór: Warning signs (respiratory distress, severe drooling, trismus) require immediate medical evaluation, regardless of the score.
translations.Evite o uso empírico de antibióticos em: Avoid empirical antibiotic use in low scores, contributing to rational use of these medications.
translations.Quais 4 critérios compõem o Escore de Ce: Which 4 criteria make up the original Centor Score?
translations.Febre, ausência de tosse, linfadenopatia: Fever, absence of cough, tender anterior cervical lymphadenopathy, and tonsillar exudate

translations.McIsaac adicionou um ajuste de pontuação: McIsaac added a score adjustment according to age group, extending the score's validity to children aged 3 years and older.
translations.Um escore de Centor/McIsaac de 4-5 ponto: A Centor/McIsaac score of 4-5 points indicates which general management?
translations.Escores de 4 a 5 pontos indicam alta pro: Scores of 4 to 5 points indicate high probability of streptococcal pharyngitis, potentially justifying empirical antibiotic treatment per medical evaluation.
translations.O Escore de Centor substitui o teste ráp: Does the Centor Score replace the rapid strep test?
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta de estimativa de p: No. It is a pre-test probability estimation tool. The rapid test or culture, when available, remain the preferred methods for diagnostic confirmation, especially in intermediate scores.
translations.Por que é importante não tratar toda dor: Why is it important not to treat every sore throat with antibiotics?
translations.A maioria das faringites agudas tem caus: Most acute pharyngitis cases have a viral cause, for which antibiotics have no effect and contribute to bacterial resistance. The Centor/McIsaac Score helps identify cases with the highest likelihood of real benefit from antibiotic treatment.
translations.<p>O Escore de Centor/McIsaac soma ponto:
The Centor/McIsaac Score sums points from 4 clinical criteria (fever, absence of cough, tender anterior cervical lymphadenopathy, and tonsillar exudate) and adjusts the result according to the patient's age group, totaling -1 to 5 points.

Quick guide: ≤0 = Very low risk | 1 = Low risk | 2-3 = Intermediate risk | 4-5 = High risk.

Indicated for patients with acute sore throat in primary care or emergency settings.

translations.Calcule o escore CHA2DS2-VASc para estim: Calculate the CHA2DS2-VASc score to estimate stroke risk in patients with atrial fibrillation and guide anticoagulation indication. Includes interpretation and evidence.
translations.Estimar o risco anual de acidente vascul: Estimate the annual risk of stroke in patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation, guiding the indication for anticoagulant therapy.
translations.Indicada para todos os pacientes com dia: Indicated for all patients diagnosed with non-valvular atrial fibrillation as part of thromboembolic risk assessment.
translations.Pacientes adultos com fibrilação atrial: Adult patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
translations.Diagnóstico de insuficiência cardíaca co: Diagnosis of congestive heart failure or left ventricular systolic dysfunction.
translations.História prévia de acidente vascular cer: Previous history of stroke, transient ischemic attack, or systemic thromboembolism.
translations.Infarto do miocárdio prévio, doença arte: Previous myocardial infarction, peripheral artery disease, or complex aortic plaque.
translations.Sexo biológico feminino (fator de risco: Female biological sex (independent risk factor for stroke in atrial fibrillation).
translations.Risco muito baixo de AVC. Em geral, anti: Very low stroke risk. Anticoagulation is generally not recommended for men with score 0 (or women with score 1 solely due to sex).
translations.• Reavaliação periódica do risco tromboe:
• Periodic reassessment of thromboembolic risk
• Individualized discussion with the medical team regarding need for anticoagulation
translations.Risco baixo de AVC. A anticoagulação pod: Low stroke risk. Anticoagulation may be considered, especially in men with score 1 (excluding the isolated female sex point).
translations.• Discutir com a equipe médica a relação:
• Discuss with the medical team the risk-benefit ratio of anticoagulation
• Consider joint assessment of bleeding risk (e.g., HAS-BLED)
translations.Risco moderado a alto de AVC. A anticoag: Moderate to high stroke risk. Oral anticoagulation is generally recommended according to current guidelines.
translations.• Anticoagulação oral geralmente recomen:
• Oral anticoagulation generally recommended, per medical evaluation
• Jointly assess bleeding risk (e.g., HAS-BLED)
• Monitor and educate the patient about anticoagulant therapy
translations.Suscetibilidade a uma diminuição no volu: Susceptibility to a decrease in blood volume that may compromise health, associated with anticoagulant therapy.
translations.Ausência ou deficiência de informação co: Absence or deficiency of cognitive information related to a specific topic, such as prescribed anticoagulant therapy.
translations.Calcular o escore CHA2DS2-VASc na avalia: Calculate the CHA2DS2-VASc score at initial assessment and periodically
translations.Orientar sobre a importância da adesão à: Educate about the importance of adherence to prescribed anticoagulation
translations.Monitorar sinais de sangramento e de eve: Monitor for signs of bleeding and thromboembolic events
translations.O escore CHA2DS2-VASc foi desenvolvido c: The CHA2DS2-VASc score was developed as a refinement of the CHADS2 score, including additional risk factors (vascular disease, age 65-74 years, and female sex), to more accurately estimate the annual stroke risk in patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
translations.Amplamente recomendado pelas principais: Widely recommended by major international cardiology guidelines (including the European Society of Cardiology) as the standard tool for decision-making regarding anticoagulation in atrial fibrillation.
translations.Validado extensivamente na literatura ca: Extensively validated in cardiology literature, with good predictive ability for thromboembolic risk, being the tool of choice in most current atrial fibrillation management guidelines.
translations.Deve ser sempre avaliado em conjunto com: It should always be assessed together with bleeding risk (e.g., HAS-BLED score) for a balanced therapeutic decision on anticoagulation. The point assigned solely for female sex should not, by itself, justify anticoagulation.
translations.O ponto atribuído pelo sexo feminino iso: The point assigned for female sex alone (without other risk factors) generally does not justify anticoagulation alone.
translations.Sempre avalie o CHA2DS2-VASc em conjunto: Always assess CHA2DS2-VASc together with bleeding risk (HAS-BLED) for a balanced therapeutic decision.
translations.Reavalie o escore periodicamente, pois f: Reassess the score periodically, as risk factors such as age and comorbidities may change over time.
translations.A decisão final sobre anticoagulação dev: The final decision on anticoagulation should involve shared discussion with the patient about risks and benefits.
translations.Quantos pontos vale a história prévia de: How many points does a history of stroke/TIA count for in CHA2DS2-VASc?
translations.AVC/AIT/tromboembolismo prévio vale 2 po: Prior stroke/TIA/thromboembolism counts for 2 points, being one of the highest weight items in the score, along with age ≥75 years.
translations.A partir de qual escore a anticoagulação: From which score is anticoagulation generally recommended?
translations.Escores de 2 pontos ou mais indicam risc: Scores of 2 points or more indicate moderate to high risk, with oral anticoagulation generally recommended by current guidelines.
translations.Por que o sexo feminino é incluído no CH: Why is female sex included in CHA2DS2-VASc?
translations.Porque é um fator de risco independente: Because it is an independent risk factor for stroke in atrial fibrillation
translations.Não há relação com sexo: There is no relation to sex
translations.O sexo feminino é reconhecido como fator: Female sex is recognized as an additional independent risk factor for stroke in patients with atrial fibrillation, being included in the CHA2DS2-VASc score.
translations.O CHA2DS2-VASc deve ser usado em fibrila: Should CHA2DS2-VASc be used in valvular atrial fibrillation?
translations.Não. O CHA2DS2-VASc foi validado para fi: No. CHA2DS2-VASc was validated for non-valvular atrial fibrillation. Patients with significant valvular disease (e.g., rheumatic mitral stenosis, mechanical prosthetic valve) have indication for anticoagulation based on their own criteria, regardless of the score.
translations.Um escore CHA2DS2-VASc de 1 ponto sempre: Does a CHA2DS2-VASc score of 1 always indicate anticoagulation?
translations.Depende do contexto: se o único ponto fo: Depends on the context: if the only point is exclusively for female sex, anticoagulation alone is generally not recommended. In other cases of score 1, the decision should be individualized, also assessing bleeding risk.
translations.<p>O CHA2DS2-VASc soma pontos de 7 fator:
CHA2DS2-VASc sums points from 7 risk factors — congestive heart failure, hypertension, age, diabetes, prior stroke/TIA, vascular disease, and female sex — with different weights (1 or 2 points), totaling 0 to 9 points, which estimate the annual stroke risk in atrial fibrillation.

Quick guide: 0 = Very low risk | 1 = Low risk | ≥2 = Moderate to high risk, anticoagulation generally recommended.

translations.Claudicação intermitente, aneurisma de a: Intermittent claudication, aortic aneurysm, peripheral arterial disease.
translations.AVC prévio ou ataque isquêmico transitór: Previous stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA), without residual hemiplegia.

translations.Carga de comorbidade leve, associada a m: Mild comorbidity burden, associated with lower 10-year mortality risk compared to higher scores.
translations.• Acompanhamento clínico das comorbidade:
• Clinical follow-up of identified comorbidities

translations.Carga de comorbidade moderada, associada: Moderate comorbidity burden, associated with intermediate 10-year mortality risk.
translations.• Avaliação multiprofissional\n• Otimiza:
• Multidisciplinary assessment
• Optimize control of present comorbidities
• Consider impact on therapeutic decisions
translations.Carga de comorbidade elevada, associada: High comorbidity burden, associated with higher 10-year mortality risk.
translations.• Avaliação multiprofissional especializ:
• Specialized multidisciplinary assessment
• Discuss care goals and prognosis with patient/family
• Optimize management of all active comorbidities
translations.O Índice de Comorbidade de Charlson foi: The Charlson Comorbidity Index was developed by Mary Charlson and colleagues in 1987, assigning weights from 1 to 6 points to 19 comorbidity categories, with additional adjustment per decade of age starting at 50 years, to estimate 10-year mortality risk.
translations.Um dos índices de comorbidade mais utili: One of the most widely used comorbidity indices globally in clinical and epidemiological research, employed for risk adjustment in observational studies and for prognostic stratification in clinical practice.
translations.Amplamente validado em diversas populaçõ: Extensively validated across diverse populations and clinical settings, with good correlation between the score and observed mortality, although performance may vary depending on the population and outcome studied.
translations.Não contempla todas as comorbidades poss: Does not encompass all possible comorbidities or their detailed individual severity. Originally developed to predict 10-year mortality, it may have lower accuracy for short-term outcomes or populations very different from the original cohort.
translations.Considere apenas comorbidades documentad: Consider only documented and confirmed comorbidities, not suspected ones.
translations.O ajuste por idade é cumulativo com as c: Age adjustment is cumulative with comorbidities — add both for the final score.
translations.Utilize o índice como apoio à discussão: Use the index to support prognostic discussion, never in isolation for therapeutic decisions.
translations.Reavalie o índice se novas comorbidades: Reassess the index if new comorbidities are diagnosed during follow-up.
translations.Quantas categorias de comorbidade compõe: How many comorbidity categories make up the original Charlson Index?
translations.O índice original avalia 19 categorias d: The original index evaluates 19 comorbidity categories, with weights from 1 to 6 points, plus age adjustment.
translations.Quantos pontos adicionais são somados po: How many additional points are added per decade of life from age 50?
translations.Soma-se 1 ponto adicional para cada déca: 1 additional point is added for each decade of life from age 50 (50-59: +1, 60-69: +2, and so on).
translations.Qual comorbidade tem o maior peso indivi: Which comorbidity has the highest individual weight in the Charlson Index?
translations.Tumor sólido metastático ou AIDS (6 pont: Metastatic solid tumor or AIDS (6 points)
translations.Tumor sólido metastático e AIDS com doen: Metastatic solid tumor and AIDS with defining disease have the highest individual weight, 6 points each.
translations.O Índice de Charlson prevê mortalidade e: Does the Charlson Index predict mortality at any time frame?
translations.O índice foi originalmente desenvolvido: The index was originally developed and validated to estimate 10-year mortality. Its use for short-term outcomes should be interpreted with caution.
translations.A versão mais utilizada na prática e em: The most widely used version in practice and research is the age-adjusted version, which adds additional points per decade of life from age 50, in addition to the comorbidity score.
translations.<p>O Índice de Charlson soma pontos (1,:
The Charlson Index sums points (1, 2, 3, or 6, depending on severity) assigned to specific comorbidities present in the patient, added to additional points per decade of age from 50 years, generating a total score associated with 10-year mortality risk.

Quick guide: 0 = No relevant comorbidity | 1-2 = Mild | 3-4 = Moderate | ≥5 = Severe.

translations.Via de administração correta - Atenção a: Correct route of administration - Pay attention to the route of administration, check the presentation on the medication vial, on the medical prescription, ask the nurse if in doubt, if doubt persists call the on-duty pharmacist or the prescribing physician.

translations.Classificar a gravidade da doença hepáti: Classify the severity of chronic liver disease (cirrhosis) and estimate prognosis and surgical risk, based on 5 clinical and laboratory parameters.
translations.Indicada em pacientes com cirrose hepáti: Indicated in patients with liver cirrhosis for severity stratification, prognosis, and assessment of surgical risk or need for liver transplantation.
translations.Pacientes adultos com diagnóstico de cir: Adult patients diagnosed with liver cirrhosis or advanced chronic liver disease.
translations.Razão Normalizada Internacional (INR) do: International Normalized Ratio (INR) of prothrombin time.
translations.Moderada a Grave / Refratária ao Tratame: Moderate to Severe / Refractory to Treatment
translations.Presença e grau de encefalopatia hepátic: Presence and grade of hepatic encephalopathy.
translations.Cirrose compensada (Classe A), associada: Compensated cirrhosis (Class A), associated with better prognosis and lower surgical risk, with estimated 1-year survival of approximately 100%.
translations.• Acompanhamento ambulatorial regular\n•:
• Regular outpatient follow-up
• Screening for esophageal varices and hepatocellular carcinoma per protocol
• Advise on alcohol abstinence and avoidance of hepatotoxins
translations.Comprometimento funcional hepático signi: Significant functional hepatic impairment (Class B), with estimated 1-year survival of approximately 80%.
translations.• Avaliação por hepatologia especializad:
• Evaluation by specialized hepatology
• Consider evaluation for liver transplantation per criteria
• Monitor for complications (ascites, encephalopathy, varices)
translations.Doença hepática descompensada grave (Cla: Severe decompensated liver disease (Class C), with estimated 1-year survival of approximately 45%, and high surgical risk.
translations.• Avaliação prioritária para transplante:
• Priority evaluation for liver transplantation
• Intensive management of complications (refractory ascites, encephalopathy, variceal bleeding)
• Avoid elective surgical procedures due to high associated risk
translations.Retenção aumentada de líquidos isotônico: Excess fluid volume related to ascites and hypoalbuminemia of cirrhosis.
translations.Início abrupto de perturbações reversíve: Acute confusion related to hepatic encephalopathy.
translations.Risco de diminuição do volume de sangue,: Risk for bleeding related to coagulopathy and portal hypertension (esophageal varices).
translations.Nutrição desequilibrada: menos do que as: Imbalanced nutrition: less than body requirements
translations.Ingestão de nutrientes insuficiente para: Insufficient nutrient intake to meet metabolic needs, common in cirrhotic patients.
translations.Ausência ou controle de complicações (as: Absence or control of complications (ascites, encephalopathy, bleeding)
translations.Calcular e reavaliar periodicamente o Es: Calculate and periodically reassess the Child-Pugh Score
translations.Monitorar sinais de encefalopatia hepáti: Monitor signs of hepatic encephalopathy (level of consciousness, asterixis)
translations.Monitorar sinais de ascite e orientar re: Monitor signs of ascites and advise fluid/sodium restriction as prescribed
translations.Avaliar sinais de sangramento (varizes e: Assess signs of bleeding (esophageal varices) and coagulopathy
translations.Encaminhar para avaliação de transplante: Refer for liver transplantation evaluation according to class and institutional criteria
translations.O Escore de Child-Pugh avalia 5 parâmetr: The Child-Pugh Score evaluates 5 parameters — bilirubin, albumin, INR (prothrombin time), ascites, and hepatic encephalopathy — each scored from 1 to 3, summing from 5 to 15 points, to classify cirrhosis severity into three classes (A, B, or C).
translations.Originalmente descrito por Child e Turco: Originally described by Child and Turcotte in 1964 for surgical risk assessment in portosystemic shunt surgery, it was modified by Pugh in 1973, replacing nutritional status with INR/prothrombin time, giving rise to the widely used current version.
translations.Extensivamente validado e utilizado há d: Extensively validated and used for decades in clinical practice for prognosis, surgical risk stratification, and prioritization for liver transplantation, although the MELD score is currently the primary criterion for organ allocation in many countries.
translations.Os parâmetros ascite e encefalopatia env: The parameters ascites and encephalopathy involve a certain degree of subjectivity in clinical assessment. The MELD score is considered more objective and is the primary criterion currently used for prioritization on liver transplant lists in most countries.
translations.O Escore de Child-Pugh varia de 5 a 15 p: The Child-Pugh Score ranges from 5 to 15 points, distributed into three classes: A (5-6), B (7-9), and C (10-15).
translations.A avaliação de ascite e encefalopatia de: Assessment of ascites and encephalopathy depends on clinical examination, which may have variability among evaluators.
translations.O escore MELD é atualmente o principal c: The MELD score is currently the main criterion for prioritization on liver transplant lists, complementing (but not replacing) Child-Pugh in clinical practice.
translations.Reavalie o escore periodicamente, pois a: Reassess the score periodically, as classification may change with clinical evolution and treatment of complications.
translations.Quantos parâmetros compõem o Escore de C: How many parameters make up the Child-Pugh Score?
translations.O escore avalia 5 parâmetros: bilirrubin: The score evaluates 5 parameters: bilirubin, albumin, INR, ascites, and hepatic encephalopathy.
translations.Qual a faixa de pontuação da Classe C (m: What is the score range for Class C (most severe)?
translations.A Classe C, que representa doença descom: Class C, which represents severe decompensated disease, corresponds to a score of 10 to 15.
translations.Qual parâmetro substituiu o estado nutri: Which parameter replaced nutritional status in Pugh's modification in 1973?
translations.Pugh substituiu o estado nutricional (us: Pugh replaced nutritional status (used by Child and Turcotte) with prothrombin time/INR, giving rise to the version of the score currently used.
translations.O Child-Pugh substitui o escore MELD?: Does Child-Pugh replace the MELD score?
translations.Não. Ambos são utilizados na avaliação d: No. Both are used in the evaluation of cirrhosis, but MELD is currently the primary criterion for prioritization on liver transplant lists in most countries, as it is considered more objective. Child-Pugh continues to be widely used for general prognosis and surgical risk assessment.
translations.A avaliação de ascite e encefalopatia é: Is the assessment of ascites and encephalopathy completely objective?
translations.Não completamente. Diferente da bilirrub: Not completely. Unlike bilirubin, albumin, and INR (objective laboratory measures), the classification of ascites and encephalopathy depends on clinical examination, which may present some variability among different evaluators.
translations.<p>O Escore de Child-Pugh soma a pontuaç:
The Child-Pugh Score sums the score (1 to 3) of 5 parameters: bilirubin, albumin, INR, ascites, and hepatic encephalopathy, totaling 5 to 15 points.

Quick guide: 5-6 = Class A (compensated) | 7-9 = Class B (significant compromise) | 10-15 = Class C (severe decompensated).

translations.Calcule a Escala Pré-Hospitalar de Cinci: Calculate the Cincinnati Prehospital Stroke Scale (CPSS) for rapid stroke screening. Includes interpretation, nursing diagnoses, and evidence.
translations.Rastrear rapidamente a suspeita de Acide: Rapidly screen for suspected stroke in the prehospital setting and initial triage using 3 clinical findings: facial droop, arm drift, and speech abnormalities.
translations.Indicada para triagem rápida de suspeita: Indicated for rapid stroke screening by emergency professionals (prehospital) and in initial emergency department assessment.
translations.Pacientes adultos com suspeita de défici: Adult patients with suspected acute neurological deficit/stroke.
translations.Peça ao paciente para sorrir ou mostrar: Ask the patient to smile or show teeth.
translations.Normal - ambos os lados do rosto se move: Normal - both sides of the face move symmetrically
translations.Anormal - um dos lados do rosto não se m: Abnormal - one side of the face does not move as well as the other (facial droop)
translations.Peça ao paciente para fechar os olhos e: Ask the patient to close their eyes and extend both arms forward for 10 seconds.
translations.Normal - ambos os braços se movem igualm: Normal - both arms move equally or do not move
translations.Anormal - um braço não se move ou cai em: Abnormal - one arm does not move or drifts down compared to the other
translations.Peça ao paciente para repetir uma frase: Ask the patient to repeat a simple sentence (e.g., "The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog").
translations.Normal - o paciente usa as palavras corr: Normal - patient uses correct words without slurring
translations.Anormal - o paciente enrola as palavras,: Abnormal - patient slurs words, uses wrong words, or is unable to speak
translations.Nenhum dos 3 achados está alterado, o qu: None of the 3 findings are abnormal, which reduces (but does not exclude) the probability of stroke.
translations.• Manter vigilância clínica, pois a esca:
• Maintain clinical vigilance, as the scale does not completely rule out stroke
• Reassess if new signs or symptoms arise
• Consider other causes for the presented symptoms
translations.Um dos 3 achados está alterado, associad: One of the 3 findings is abnormal, associated with approximately 72% probability of stroke.
translations.• Ativar protocolo de AVC/linha de cuida:
• Activate stroke protocol/care pathway immediately
• Record symptom onset time (or last known well time)
• Transport with priority to a stroke-capable center, keeping the patient NPO
translations.Dois ou três achados estão alterados, as: Two or three findings are abnormal, associated with ≥85% probability of stroke.
translations.• Ativar protocolo de AVC/linha de cuida:
• Activate stroke protocol/care pathway with maximum priority
• Record symptom onset time (or last known well time)
• Transport immediately to a stroke-capable center, keeping the patient NPO and under continuous monitoring
translations.Redução da circulação sanguínea cerebral: Decrease in cerebral blood circulation that may compromise health, suspected by findings of facial droop, arm drift, and/or speech abnormalities.
translations.Risco de entrada de secreções gastrintes: Risk of entry of gastrointestinal secretions, oropharyngeal secretions, solids, or fluids into the tracheobronchial passages, related to possible swallowing impairment in suspected stroke.
translations.CPSS aplicada rapidamente diante de susp: CPSS applied promptly upon suspicion of acute neurological deficit
translations.Horário de início dos sintomas registrad: Symptom onset time recorded and communicated to the team
translations.Protocolo de AVC ativado prontamente qua: Stroke protocol activated promptly when indicated
translations.Aplicar a CPSS rapidamente diante de qua: Apply CPSS promptly upon any suspicion of acute neurological deficit
translations.Registrar com precisão o horário de iníc: Accurately record symptom onset time or last known well time
translations.Ativar imediatamente o protocolo/linha d: Immediately activate stroke protocol/care pathway when any finding is abnormal
translations.Manter o paciente em jejum e monitorizar: Keep patient NPO and monitor vital signs and capillary blood glucose
translations.Transportar/encaminhar com prioridade pa: Transport/refer with priority to a facility capable of reperfusion therapies
translations.A CPSS avalia 3 achados clínicos — paral: The CPSS assesses 3 clinical findings — facial palsy, arm drift, and speech abnormality — each scored as 0 (normal) or 1 (abnormal), totaling 0 to 3 abnormal findings. The presence of any abnormal finding is considered significant for suspicion of stroke.
translations.Desenvolvida em 1997 na Universidade de: Developed in 1997 at the University of Cincinnati, it is a simplified adaptation of the NIHSS for rapid use in the prehospital setting by emergency teams, without the need for extensive specialized neurological training.
translations.Amplamente validada e utilizada internac: Widely validated and used internationally in prehospital care protocols. The presence of 1 abnormal finding is associated with an approximately 72% probability of stroke, and the presence of all 3 findings with a probability equal to or greater than 85%.
translations.É uma ferramenta de triagem rápida, e nã: It is a rapid screening tool and does not replace the complete neurological assessment (e.g., NIHSS) performed in the hospital setting. It may not detect strokes with atypical presentation, such as some posterior circulation/cerebellar cases.
translations.A CPSS foi desenvolvida para uso rápido: The CPSS was developed for rapid and simple use by prehospital emergency teams, without the need for specialized neurological training.
translations.A presença de apenas 1 dos 3 achados alt: The presence of only 1 of the 3 abnormal findings is already sufficient for a significant probability of stroke (~72%) and should prompt activation of the stroke protocol.
translations.Sempre registre com precisão o horário d: Always accurately record the time of symptom onset (or the last time the patient was seen normal) — this information is essential for therapeutic decisions.
translations.A CPSS é uma ferramenta de triagem rápid: The CPSS is a rapid screening tool and does not replace the complete neurological assessment (e.g., NIHSS) performed later in the hospital.
translations.Quais são os 3 achados avaliados pela Es: What are the 3 findings assessed by the Cincinnati Scale?
translations.Nível de consciência, pupilas e força mo: Level of consciousness, pupils, and motor strength
translations.Paralisia facial, queda do braço e alter: Facial palsy, arm drift, and speech abnormality
translations.Frequência cardíaca, pressão arterial e: Heart rate, blood pressure, and oxygen saturation
translations.Glicemia, temperatura e escala de coma: Blood glucose, temperature, and coma scale
translations.A CPSS avalia 3 achados: paralisia facia: The CPSS assesses 3 findings: facial palsy (asymmetry when smiling), arm drift, and speech abnormality.
translations.Qual a probabilidade aproximada de AVC q: What is the approximate probability of stroke when only 1 of the 3 CPSS findings is abnormal?
translations.A presença de 1 achado alterado na CPSS: The presence of 1 abnormal finding on the CPSS is associated with an approximately 72% probability of stroke.
translations.A CPSS substitui a avaliação neurológica: Does the CPSS replace the complete neurological assessment (e.g., NIHSS) in the hospital?
translations.Sim, é equivalente e substitui totalment: Yes, it is equivalent and fully replaces it
translations.Não, é uma ferramenta de triagem rápida: No, it is a rapid prehospital screening tool and does not replace subsequent complete assessment
translations.Sim, mas apenas em pacientes idosos: Yes, but only in elderly patients
translations.Não tem relação com a NIHSS: It has no relation to the NIHSS
translations.A CPSS é uma ferramenta de triagem rápid: The CPSS is a rapid screening tool derived from the NIHSS, useful in the prehospital setting, but does not replace the complete neurological assessment performed later in the hospital.
translations.A CPSS pode ser usada por qualquer profi: Can the CPSS be used by any healthcare professional without prior training?
translations.A CPSS foi desenhada para ser simples e: The CPSS was designed to be simple and rapid, but still requires basic training on how to conduct and interpret the 3 tests (smile, arm extension, and phrase repetition), being widely used by prehospital emergency teams.
translations.Um resultado normal na CPSS exclui a pos: Does a normal CPSS result exclude the possibility of stroke?
translations.Não. A CPSS reduz, mas não exclui comple: No. The CPSS reduces but does not completely exclude the probability of stroke, especially in atypical presentations such as some posterior circulation/cerebellar strokes. Clinical vigilance should be maintained even with a normal result in the presence of other warning signs.

translations.<p>A CPSS avalia 3 achados — paralisia f:
The CPSS assesses 3 findings — facial palsy, arm drift, and speech changes — each scored as 0 (normal) or 1 (abnormal).

Quick guide: 0 = Low probability | 1 finding = ~72% probability of stroke | 2-3 findings = ≥85% probability of stroke.

translations.Pacientes adultos em risco ou com síndro: Adult patients at risk or with established alcohol withdrawal syndrome, hospitalized or in detoxification units.

Mild alcohol withdrawal symptoms. Generally no need for specific pharmacological treatment.
translations.• Monitorização de sinais vitais\n• Supo:
• Vital sign monitoring
• Comfort measures and rehydration as needed
• Periodic reassessment with CIWA-Ar
translations.Sintomas moderados de abstinência alcoól: Moderate alcohol withdrawal symptoms. May require pharmacological treatment per medical protocol.
translations.• Comunicar à equipe médica para avaliaç:
• Notify medical team for evaluation of pharmacological treatment
• More frequent monitoring
• Serial reassessment with CIWA-Ar (usually every 1-2 hours)
translations.Sintomas graves de abstinência alcoólica: Severe alcohol withdrawal symptoms, with increased risk of seizures and delirium tremens.
translations.• Comunicar imediatamente à equipe médic:
• Immediately communicate to the medical team
• Pharmacological treatment is generally indicated
• Continuous monitoring
• Consider transfer to a higher complexity unit
translations.Sensação vaga e incômoda de desconforto: Vague and uncomfortable feeling of discomfort or fear, accompanied by autonomic response.
translations.Vulnerabilidade aumentada a quedas, asso: Increased vulnerability to falls, associated with tremor, agitation, and altered mental status.
translations.Administrar medicação conforme prescriçã: Administer medication according to prescription and obtained score
translations.Manter ambiente seguro e com estímulos r: Maintain a safe environment with reduced stimuli
translations.Monitorar sinais vitais e nível de consc: Monitor vital signs and level of consciousness
translations.Comunicar imediatamente sinais de agrava: Immediately communicate signs of worsening to the medical team
translations.O CIWA-Ar (Clinical Institute Withdrawal: The CIWA-Ar (Clinical Institute Withdrawal Assessment for Alcohol, Revised) was developed by Sullivan and colleagues in 1989, assessing 10 items related to signs and symptoms of alcohol withdrawal, allowing objective quantification of the severity of the syndrome and guiding the need for pharmacological treatment.
translations.Amplamente utilizado em protocolos de de: Widely used in hospital alcohol detoxification protocols, allowing symptom-triggered therapy, which reduces the total amount of medication used compared to fixed-dose regimens.
translations.Validado extensivamente na literatura, s: Extensively validated in the literature, considered the gold standard for assessing the severity of alcohol withdrawal in clinical settings, with good reliability when applied by trained professionals.
translations.Requer treinamento adequado da equipe pa: Requires adequate staff training for standardized application. Should not be applied to patients with significant decreased level of consciousness due to other causes, which may compromise the assessment of subjective items.
translations.Reavalie o CIWA-Ar de forma seriada (ger: Reassess CIWA-Ar serially (usually every 1-2 hours in the first 24-72 hours) to monitor the evolution of the condition.
translations.O tratamento guiado por sintomas (usando: Symptom-triggered therapy (using CIWA-Ar) tends to use less total medication than fixed-dose regimens.
translations.Alucinações presentes em qualquer dos it: Hallucinations present in any of the sensory items significantly increase risk and warrant immediate attention.
translations.Mantenha ambiente calmo, com estímulos r: Maintain a calm environment with reduced stimuli to help control symptoms.
translations.Quantos itens compõem o CIWA-Ar?: How many items make up the CIWA-Ar?
translations.O CIWA-Ar avalia 10 itens: náusea/vômito: The CIWA-Ar assesses 10 items: nausea/vomiting, tremor, sweating, anxiety, agitation, tactile, auditory, and visual disturbances, headache, and orientation.
translations.A partir de qual escore o CIWA-Ar indica: From which score does the CIWA-Ar indicate severe withdrawal, with higher risk of delirium tremens?
translations.Escores de 19 pontos ou mais indicam abs: Scores of 19 points or more indicate severe withdrawal, with increased risk of seizures and delirium tremens.
translations.Qual a vantagem do tratamento guiado por: What is the advantage of symptom-triggered therapy using CIWA-Ar compared to fixed-dose regimens?
translations.Tende a usar menos medicação total, indi: Tends to use less total medication, individualizing treatment
translations.O tratamento guiado por sintomas (sympto: Symptom-triggered therapy using CIWA-Ar tends to result in a lower total amount of medication used, compared to fixed-dose regimens.
translations.O CIWA-Ar pode ser usado em qualquer pac: Can CIWA-Ar be used in any patient with decreased level of consciousness?
translations.Não. O CIWA-Ar depende de itens subjetiv: No. CIWA-Ar depends on subjective items reported by the patient, being less reliable in patients with significant decreased level of consciousness due to other associated causes.
translations.Com que frequência o CIWA-Ar deve ser re: How often should CIWA-Ar be reassessed?
translations.Geralmente a cada 1 a 2 horas nas primei: Generally every 1 to 2 hours in the first 24 to 72 hours after the last alcohol intake, or per institutional protocol, especially in patients with high scores.
translations.<p>O CIWA-Ar soma pontos de 10 itens rel:
The CIWA-Ar sums points from 10 items related to signs and symptoms of alcohol withdrawal — nausea/vomiting, tremor, sweating, anxiety, agitation, tactile, auditory, and visual disturbances, headache, and orientation — totaling 0 to 67 points.

Quick guide: 0-9 = Mild | 10-18 = Moderate | ≥19 = Severe, risk of delirium tremens.

translations.Escala de Cornell - Depressão em Demênci: Cornell Scale for Depression in Dementia (CSDD)
translations.Calcule a Escala de Cornell para Depress: Calculate the Cornell Scale for Depression in Dementia (CSDD) and assess depressive symptoms in patients with cognitive impairment. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Escala de Cornell para Depressão em Demê: Cornell Scale for Depression in Dementia
translations.Avaliar a presença e gravidade de sintom: Assess the presence and severity of depressive symptoms in patients with cognitive impairment/dementia, based on 19 items grouped into 5 domains: mood signs, behavioral disturbance, physical signs, cyclic functions, and ideational disturbance.
translations.Indicada para rastreio de depressão em i: Indicated for screening depression in elderly with mild to severe dementia, especially when patient self-report is unreliable.
translations.Idosos com demência ou comprometimento c: Elderly with dementia or moderate to severe cognitive impairment, institutionalized or in outpatient/home care.
translations.Expressão triste, voz triste, choro fáci: Sad expression, sad voice, easy crying.
translations.A3. Falta de Reatividade a Eventos Agrad: A3. Lack of Reactivity to Pleasant Events
translations.Ausência de resposta emocional positiva: Absence of positive emotional response to pleasant events.
translations.Movimentos lentos, fala lenta, reações l: Slow movements, slow speech, slow reactions.
translations.Pontuar 0 se as queixas forem exclusivam: Score 0 if complaints are exclusively gastrointestinal.
translations.Menor envolvimento em atividades habitua: Less involvement in usual activities (score only if change occurred acutely, in less than 1 month).
translations.Pontuar 2 se maior que ~2,3 kg em um mês: Score 2 if greater than ~2.3 kg in one month.
translations.Fadiga fácil, incapaz de manter atividad: Easy fatigue, unable to maintain activities (score only if change occurred acutely, in less than 1 month).
translations.Mais tarde do que o habitual para este i: Later than usual for this individual.
translations.Interrupções frequentes do sono ao longo: Frequent sleep interruptions throughout the night.
translations.Mais cedo do que o habitual para este in: Earlier than usual for this individual.
translations.Sente que a vida não vale a pena (1), te: Feels life is not worth living (1), has active desire for death or recent attempt (2).
Delusions of poverty, illness, or loss.
translations.Pontuação de 0 a 10 pontos, compatível c: Score 0 to 10 points, consistent with absence of clinically significant depressive symptoms.
translations.• Manter acompanhamento de rotina\n• Rea:
• Maintain routine follow-up
• Reassess periodically and after relevant changes in clinical or cognitive status
translations.Pontuação entre 11 e 18 pontos sugere pr: Score between 11 and 18 points suggests probable major depressive episode.
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação psiquiátrica:
• Refer for specialized psychiatric/geriatric evaluation
• Investigate reversible causes and associated comorbidities
• Consider therapeutic interventions (pharmacological and non-pharmacological) as per specialized evaluation
translations.Pontuação de 19 pontos ou mais, compatív: Score of 19 points or more, consistent with definite major depressive episode.
translations.• Encaminhamento psiquiátrico prioritári:
• Priority psychiatric referral
• Carefully assess suicide risk (item E1)
• Consider antidepressant treatment and intensive multidisciplinary follow-up
translations.Suscetibilidade a autolesão com intenção: Susceptibility to self-harm with intent to die, identified especially by the suicidal ideation item of the scale.
translations.Estado subjetivo em que a pessoa vê alte: Subjective state in which the individual sees limited or no personal alternatives and is unable to mobilize energy for their own benefit.
translations.Interrupções por tempo limitado da quant: Time-limited interruptions in the quantity and quality of sleep, related to items of cyclic functions on the scale.
translations.Ingestão de nutrientes insuficiente para: Insufficient nutrient intake to meet metabolic needs, related to loss of appetite and weight identified on the scale.
translations.Risco de suicídio avaliado e monitorado: Suicide risk assessed and monitored when ideation is present
translations.Aplicar a CSDD por meio de entrevista es: Administer the CSDD through a structured interview with the caregiver and a brief interview with the patient
translations.Investigar e minimizar a interferência d: Investigate and minimize interference of physical illnesses and disabilities in the scoring of somatic items
translations.Avaliar cuidadosamente qualquer ideação: Carefully evaluate any identified suicidal ideation and notify the medical team immediately
translations.Encaminhar para avaliação psiquiátrica/g: Refer for psychiatric/geriatric evaluation according to obtained score
translations.Reaplicar a escala periodicamente para m: Reapply the scale periodically to monitor response to interventions (e.g., antidepressants)
translations.A CSDD avalia 19 itens em 5 domínios — s: The CSDD assesses 19 items in 5 domains — mood signs (anxiety, sadness, lack of reactivity, irritability), behavioral disturbance (agitation, retardation, physical complaints, loss of interest), physical signs (appetite, weight, energy), cyclic functions (diurnal variation, sleep), and ideational disturbance (suicide, self-esteem, pessimism, delusions) — each scored from 0 to 2, totaling 0 to 38 points.
translations.Desenvolvida por Alexopoulos, Abrams, Yo: Developed by Alexopoulos, Abrams, Young, and Shamoian in 1988 at Cornell University, it was the first depression scale specifically validated for use in patients with dementia, combining caregiver information and direct patient observation.
translations.Amplamente validada internacionalmente p: Widely validated internationally for use in patients with mild to severe dementia, with good sensitivity and specificity. Scores above 10 suggest probable major depression, and above 18, definite major depression.
translations.Itens somáticos (queixas físicas, perda: Somatic items (physical complaints, loss of appetite/weight, lack of energy) may be confounded by physical illnesses or disabilities unrelated to depression — it is recommended to score 0 on these items when the symptom is clearly attributable to a physical cause. Requires training for reliable application of the structured interview.
translations.A CSDD é a escala de depressão mais util: The CSDD is the most widely used depression scale specifically for patients with dementia, combining caregiver interview and brief patient interview.
translations.Itens somáticos (queixas físicas, apetit: Somatic items (physical complaints, appetite, weight, energy) may be confounded by physical illnesses — score 0 when the symptom is clearly due to a physical cause, not emotional.
translations.O item de ideação suicida deve ser inves: The suicidal ideation item should be investigated with special care: a score of 1 indicates passive ideation (feels life is not worth living), a score of 2 indicates active ideation or recent attempt.
translations.Reaplique a escala periodicamente para m: Reapply the scale periodically to monitor response to therapeutic interventions, especially antidepressant treatment.
translations.Quantos itens compõem a Escala de Cornel: How many items make up the Cornell Scale (CSDD) and what is the maximum score?
translations.A CSDD avalia 19 itens, cada um pontuado: The CSDD assesses 19 items, each scored from 0 to 2, totaling a maximum score of 38 points.
translations.Como deve ser pontuado um item somático: How should a somatic item (e.g., loss of appetite) be scored when clearly caused by physical illness, and not by depression?
translations.Excluir o paciente da avaliação: Exclude the patient from the assessment
translations.Para evitar pontuações falsamente elevad: To avoid falsely elevated scores, somatic items clearly attributable to disability or physical illness should be scored as 0.
translations.Qual pontuação de corte sugere um episód: Which cutoff score suggests a major depressive episode defined by the CSDD?
translations.Pontuações acima de 18 sugerem um episód: Scores above 18 suggest a defined major depressive episode; above 10 already suggest a probable major depressive episode.
translations.A CSDD pode ser aplicada sem a colaboraç: Can the CSDD be applied without the caregiver's collaboration?
translations.Não é recomendado. A CSDD foi desenhada: It is not recommended. The CSDD was designed as a structured interview that combines the caregiver's report (observing the patient's behavior over the previous week) with a brief direct interview with the patient, and this combination is essential for its validity in patients with cognitive impairment.
translations.Doenças físicas podem inflar artificialm: Can physical illnesses artificially inflate the CSDD score?
translations.Sim. Idosos frequentemente têm doenças f: Yes. Elderly individuals often have physical illnesses with symptoms similar to depression (loss of appetite, weight, energy). To minimize falsely high scores, somatic items should be scored as 0 when clearly attributable to a physical condition, not a depressive disorder.
translations.<p>A CSDD soma a pontuação (0 a 2) de 19:
The CSDD sums the score (0 to 2) of 19 items distributed across 5 domains — mood signs, behavioral disturbance, physical signs, cyclic functions, and ideational disturbance — totaling 0 to 38 points.

Quick guide: 0-10 = No significant depression | 11-18 = Probable major depression | 19-38 = Definite major depression.
